name: unicode_literal_casefold_now_claimed
description: #555 Slice 2 — NOW CLAIMED (was a unicode_casefold fallback-boundary guard). String literal "GRÜN" against input "grün": exact + accent-fold miss, so match_string reaches the case-insensitive fold, which now routes through bamlunicode (byte-for-byte Rust str::to_lowercase) — GRÜN and grün both fold to grün, so native CLAIMS the match and emits the canonical literal GRÜN instead of falling back. want is BAML v0.223's byte-exact final parse, held by this differential; native==BAML is independently proven by the exhaustive bamlunicode Rust reference.
